note: A1 :identity pane (roster|detail @0.5): the LEFT principal roster renders text rows (left_wall edge_energy >= 1.0). The center (entity_core) is the list|detail BOUNDARY of a left-heavy roster, so it is legitimately sparser — its floor is 0.5 (still distinct from a blank region's ~0, the negative control), holding for both the dense live fold and the offline seed. The frame stays dark-theme (entity_core luma <= 120). Authored from design intent.
